reviews.review_text: Awesome place. Loved the staff and locals. Really cool experience hey :)

Is Clean but the room service needs to make more en effort seriously to clean the rooms & clean the cabins wash the walls get a better shower heads put a curfew when people checking in at night when it's late 2:30 or 3 in the morning a.m. that's not fair on other people to be putting up without as a service you need to sort that out you need to make sure that people are not smoking in the Cabins or in the rooms or not smoking weed you need better shower heads & 💯 clearly clean the rooms & cabins leave more bin bags & put a better heater in the single rooms & make more en effort seriously to clean the cabins wash & clean & maybe think about having a curfew of people checking in and maybe get some security because if someone smokes we there might be allergic to it
I have heard they are really friendly and service is good and it's dog friendly and they have long term stays which helps the locals and the tradies

Pretty atrocious.

Talking with a trusted friend and i cant even find her annonaymus review that gave one star, within last 12 months. So heres mine on her behalf.

Gist is, she payed for two bunks so she could have a room to herself. On the last few nights that she was there, they had given away one of her bunks, allowing a drunkard man into her room, without giving her any notice.

They gave a key, to a room thats she'd payed extra for so she wouldn't have to share, and they gave it to a dunkard.

Without giving her any notice because they where "overbooked"

....
She ended up swapping rooms with the man next door, because he kindly enough offered when he noticed... and he was only paying for one bunk and the bunkbed below him was empty -_-

Idk about you but after having read some of the other reviews from within the last year or so, i would not trust them.
Location was perfect to explore Adelaide. As you get closer to Adelaide the prices become to high. This place is still at normal park prices.

I do not recommend this for tourists and caravanners. We filled in the enquiry form as requested and recieved a phone called stating we needed to be there by 5pm. I said we wont be able to be there by then and if there are no after hour options and was met with a rude reply saying the do not offer this for non-locals! Its a TOURIST PARK!
Absolute great location on the north side.

The fully self-contained unit I stayed in was absolutely beautiful, and well decked out with absolutely everything you could possibly need. The linen was soft, and the bed very comfortable. The campground was quiet, staff communication was excellent, and everything was very functional. Zero complaints, and would stay here again 👍
Nice cabins very clean, playground for the kids

Great place to stay.
Quiet, Amenities are Immaculate.
Staff are Amazing, so helpful and kind.
My whole experience has been relaxing and stress free.
Thanks GGTP
Always lovely,friendly staff, well maintained and clean an tidy. Love staying here

Stayed here with my team Monash Nova Rover whilst competing in the Australian Rover Challenge 2025. Gawler Gateway was a fantastic location to stay - extremely convenient and very comfortable. Would highly recommend to everyone!
Great place to stay. Accommodation to suit everyone. Friendly staff, always happy to help no matter what . Highly Recommend
Lovely place to stop.
Had a lovely stay earlier this year in March.
Had a lovely week-long stay here in March, great facilities and campsites.
Great place to stay, good facilities and helpful staff :) Very accomodating for our large group
Really great rooms and amenities!
Great facilities and friendly staff.  Close to a number of shopping areas but nothing in walking distance.  Very quiet.
We live locally and visited family. Clean, good location & good amenities. Hidden gem
Friendly staff. Nice atmosphere
It's  a lovely caravan park,clean,friendly,will come back again😀
Host’s were lovely. Quiet spot,  close to town and train. Clean amenities. We highly recommend. An overnight stay turned into a week.
Staff so helpful and welcoming.

We stayed for almost 2 weeks and its a great park.clise to all shopping both Munno Para and gawler.very clean amenities.lovely clean pool..the girls in the reception bent over backwards for myself and my son Aaron Hirschausen..We appreciate every effort you did to accommodate our needs at the time.thankyiu so much and we will be back again ...
Came by myself and didn't feel safe.

The Ladies are always so helpful, great service from all at this Tourist Park. Very clean amenities & so quiet considering they are full. They have a pool, 2 camp kitchens and a playground area with grass. There is also a big space out the back of the tourist park with BBQS and to  walk your dog 🙂
Just a park in the middle of now where, most seem happy enough though.
Awesome park well maintained facilities are great extremely well priced, Danny and Kelly are very welcoming and friendly
Beautiful place, very clean, fantastic playground for the kids. Large sites divided by lovely gardens. Everyone is very friendly. Will definitely be coming to stay again!

Amenities and laundry are out dated and not cleaned well, will leave floors wet to be a slipping hazard; also has black mould on amenities ceilings. Has no disabled amenities. A certain staff member is owner's eyes and ears in the park and will rat you out even if it's lies as is friends with certain people in the park. But owner doesn't realise that they are paying said staff member to sit around and talk to people, telling people what is said in staff meetings. And before it's said that we have the wrong place just because it's a bad review we can prove we are talking about the correct park. If you want to be treated as a human and not a number or $$$ we highly recommend you go elsewhere. And I don't care how long ago we were falsely evicted, the review is still valid.
Owner is rude
Unbelievable that security cameras are allowed inside the women’s and men’s toilet especially when there’s a camera filming you as you use the key to enter
Staff an worker are great to get along with very understanding with any problem you raise with them I would recommend anyone to stay here

If you are staying  there please be mindfull of the security cameras in the women's and men's changerooms.
There is a sign on the door which when you walk in basically gives them the right to record you.
They say their legal.
I feel rather disturbed knowing  that.
I don't know any other caravan park that has this situation.

We've been here in our caravan since December 2023 and 8 months later, cannot complain one bit. The staff are super kind and welcoming. The other residents here are the same. Facilities are cleaned twice a day and if you ever have any issues, staff are always willing to help. Sites are spacious and the scenery is beautiful. Lots of native trees and the atmosphere is wonderful. The resident children love the park and in the summer the pool is amazing. The reserve up the back is great as well, with barbecue facilities and makes for a nice walk (keep an eye out for snakes). Honestly, cannot complain one bit. Great location overall.

I found myself in a state of temporary homelessness and the staff were very friendly and helpful finding me affordable accommodation in their park. I can't thank them enough for that. I stayed about 3 weeks in a cabin and found it totally comfortable and quiet, especially at night. I used many of the facilities throughout the park (laundry, washing lines, showers etc) and all were kept spotless and in working order by friendly staff. Once again guys, thankyou.

Have been here before and would definitely do so again. Our site was easy to get into with our 9m van. Amenities were dated but always clean. The location of this park is fantastic and I found it great that when arriving from the south and leaving to head north there is a u-turn lane that is easy to use.
Staff are friendly and the office is very knowledgeable and helpful.
Thoroughly recommend this park.
Perfect location for a trip to Adelaide.
Great tourist park 👏 nice and quiet at night great cabins and friendly helpful staff.

Stayed 8 nights and be surprised, it’s close to a main road but very quiet during the night, very close to a terrific choice of shopping centres. Amenities outdated but extremely clean. Clean laundry just $3 x 45 minute wash. Yes, CCTV in bathrooms just in front area but not in cubicles but that’s because of vandalism since CCTV they’ve not had any vandalism. Great park for big rigs. Very friendly staff. Noticed not all sites had a green mat but our drive thru did. Green lawns around for a refreshing look. Will definitely go back at $38 pn for drive thru.

First time here at the gawler gateway Park. Warm and friendly welcome. That was a good start.
$38 a night for a powered sight
Can't beat that. Clean and well laid out park good size sites ideal for your annexe. Amenities although dated they were clean unlike some of the more upmarket parks we've been to. You've got your pool a playground for the kids pet friendly. I have no complaints. This is our go to park now when we come to Adelaide.  Out of  a lot of the parks we've stayed at that charge quite a bit more with unclean sites poor customer service are poorly designed
Gawler gateway gets a big thumbs up from me.
Great location to Gawler & city on Main North Road.

We booked here as our preferred locations  didn't have availability.  I was prepared  to make the best of it and overlook the dated and rundown facilities and tiny $44  pn site until, between the local drag races happening incessantly on the adjacent road and the resident lunatic giving everything  he had to a screaming, threatening and swearing tirade for hours in the early morning, I figured this is really not a nice or safe place to stay l. Unfortunately the housing crisis has pushed many into park living and while most people are decent and socially appropriate there's always one who ruins it and this park certainly has a high achiever! No doubt he will sleep all day in preparation for another performanc.
Save your money and your sanity by staying somewhere  else.

My family and I (3adults, 2kids, 2dogs) were meant to stay here recently for a few nights. We booked a powered site for our tent. We booked this place as it is advertised as pet friendly. THIS WAS NOT THE CASE. It was extremely hot weather (out of their control I know) however, there is NO GRASS that dogs can access. The ground is covered in sharp rocks  and concrete. There is a grass space but dogs are NOT ALLOWED to be on it, regardless of the ground damaging our dogs feet. We spoke to staff and were told to take the dogs to the back where there is a dam, but the ground up there is worse. We had to drive our dogs to a local grassed spot for them to use the toilet.
The staff here constantly drive around and watch you and our site was two steps away from the ‘dump point’ for caravans. The smell was appalling. We were also next to all the bins which also smelt terrible.
Honestly, this place was just horrible and I would advise no one stay here. Both my dogs feet were damaged and needed vet treatment just from getting in and out of the car for toilet breaks. We left as soon as we found other accomodation and didn’t even stay one night. It’s also a no refund policy so no matter how bad they make your stay, your money is gone. It’s just not worth it and you can absolutely find somewhere better.

I'm sitting here getting angrier and angrier.  Came here 2 weeks ago in one of these octagonal cabins. Was nice and clean and no problems. Today after coming for a hospital procedure  thought we would stay again.  Got here in 44 degree heat wanting to have a rest. No aircon on so after half an hour my head couldn't handle being in here. With apologies from staff member had to get out and sit in macdonalds for hour and a half. Now with it so hot outside you just want to stay inside and now the tv reception is terrible.  No 7 or 10 and others with annoying 9 screeching on and off I'm really getting  mad. Sorry guys I thought you were going to be my go to place out this way but unfortunately I should have paid the $20 extra elsewhere sadly 🥺

Good stopover location, clean amenities, although it is a bit odd having CCTV in the bathrooms .
Management is very helpful. Permanent locals are generally very approachable

We recently had a powered site here and while I understand the need for security, I'm just not sure of the necessity or legality of CCTV in the bathrooms. This isn't made clear on their website and I wasn't comfortable with constantly being recorded. I've stayed at multiple van parks over the last month and not one has CCTV in bathrooms or pool areas. I wouldn't have stayed if I knew this was the case.
Just stopped by visiting a relative. The park has a lot to offer families. It's clean, well maintained and pretty full at this time of the year.

My second stay here, very reasonable pricing. Admin staff are great and so nice.  The groundsman Paul was very helpful, especially with advice that I needed, and he has done an amazing reno to the pool area, it looks fantastic and so much more welcoming.  Met some lovely permanents, who helped me with transport,  looked after me and shared fun times.  Very clean park  and great variety of groceries etc in the office.  Will definitely go back.

I have used Gawler Gateway several times for large group accommodation and have enjoyed wonderful service each time. Most recently in October I used Gawler Gateway to accommodate 66 people in the Gateway Lodge and Gateway Quarters. The staff at the Gateway Lodge were really friendly, helpful, and flexible, and organising large group bookings with them has been a breeze. Highly recommended!
Nice tidy park. Great service.

Needed some urgent accommodation to attend a funeral because our first choice was not up to standard (it smelt). Rang on the off chance they had a cabin left and they did. It’s not a spectacular tourist park but our accommodation was light and airy,, the bed was comfortable, it had a great shower and the hosts were very obliging. Very good value for money.
Had a powered site. Facilities very clean and nice. Staff are very friendly and helpful. We stay here regularly and have enjoyed every stay there.
All good here we like it.
Great caravan park, clean amenities

Wonderful and big caravan park, lots of powered sites, cabins and unpowered sites, nice big amenities block and very clean, dog friendly and friendly staff. About 5min drive to shopping centre.  Good price as well.
It’s really nice amenities beautiful and clean staff are very friendly going to enjoy our stay ⭐️⭐️
